version.name: @rrrtx/xr
version.description: XR 4.1 (Unified Execution Fabric) — one canonical execution contract for every consequential action, with explicit lifecycle, policy/approval/budget gates, idempotency, cancellation/timeout/retry, and bounded local execution history.
version.author: Muhammad Ahmad (@ahmadrrrtx)
